'''鈭歱-dh-t''' ('''padhata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yesk|yesk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-dh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yesk|yesk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-dh-t
|-
! Lemma
| padhata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:padhatithi|padhatithi]] || [[word:padhatiji|padhatiji]] || [[word:padhatishi|padhatishi]] || [[word:padhati|padhati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:padhatuthuth|padhatuthuth]] || [[word:padhatujuj|padhatujuj]] || [[word:padhatushush|padhatushush]] || [[word:padhat|padhat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:padhatuthu|padhatuthu]] || [[word:padhatuju|padhatuju]] || [[word:padhatushu|padhatushu]] || [[word:padhatu|padhatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:padhatufuth|padhatufuth]] || [[word:padhatufuj|padhatufuj]] || [[word:padhatufush|padhatufush]] || [[word:padhatuf|padhatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:padhatethe|padhatethe]] || [[word:padhateje|padhateje]] || [[word:padhateshe|padhateshe]] || [[word:padhate|padhate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:padhatothoth|padhatothoth]] || [[word:padhatojoj|padhatojoj]] || [[word:padhatoshosh|padhatoshosh]] || [[word:padhat|padhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:padhatotho|padhatotho]] || [[word:padhatojo|padhatojo]] || [[word:padhatosho|padhatosho]] || [[word:padhato|padhato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:padhatofoth|padhatofoth]] || [[word:padhatofoj|padhatofoj]] || [[word:padhatofosh|padhatofosh]] || [[word:padhatof|padhatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:padhat忙th忙|padhat忙th忙]] || [[word:padhat忙j忙|padhat忙j忙]] || [[word:padhat忙sh忙|padhat忙sh忙]] || [[word:padhat忙|padhat忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:padhatathath|padhatathath]] || [[word:padhatajaj|padhatajaj]] || [[word:padhatashash|padhatashash]] || [[word:padhat|padhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:padhatatha|padhatatha]] || [[word:padhataja|padhataja]] || [[word:padhatasha|padhatasha]] || [[word:padhata|padhata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:padhatafath|padhatafath]] || [[word:padhatafaj|padhatafaj]] || [[word:padhatafash|padhatafash]] || [[word:padhataf|padhataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:padhatasha|padhatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopadhatasha|gopadhatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipadhatasha|gokipadhatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:padhatn眉sha|padhatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopadhatnkn眉sha|gopadhatnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipadhatn眉sha|gokipadhatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:padhatsh毛sha|padhatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopadhatnksh毛sha|gopadhatnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipadhatsh毛sha|gokipadhatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:padhatrosha|padhatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopadhatnkrosha|gopadhatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipadhatrosha|gokipadhatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:padhatmusha|padhatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadhatnkmusha|gopadhatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhatmusha|gokipadhatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:padhatsherasha|padhatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopadhatnksherasha|gopadhatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipadhatsherasha|gokipadhatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:padhatngasha|padhatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopadhatnkngasha|gopadhatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipadhatngasha|gokipadhatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:padhatyasha|padhatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopadhatnkyasha|gopadhatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipadhatyasha|gokipadhatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:padhatyamasha|padhatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopadhatnkyamasha|gopadhatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipadhatyamasha|gokipadhatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:padhatn眉sh毛sha|padhatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopadhatnkn眉sh毛sha|gopadhatnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipadhatn眉sh毛sha|gokipadhatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:padhatn眉rosha|padhatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopadhatnkn眉rosha|gopadhatnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipadhatn眉rosha|gokipadhatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padhatn眉musha|padhatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadhatnkn眉musha|gopadhatnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhatn眉musha|gokipadhatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:padhatsh毛n眉sha|padhatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopadhatnksh毛n眉sha|gopadhatnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipadhatsh毛n眉sha|gokipadhatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:padhatsh毛rosha|padhatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopadhatnksh毛rosha|gopadhatnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipadhatsh毛rosha|gokipadhatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padhatsh毛musha|padhatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadhatnksh毛musha|gopadhatnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhatsh毛musha|gokipadhatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:padhatron眉sha|padhatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopadhatnkron眉sha|gopadhatnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipadhatron眉sha|gokipadhatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:padhatrosh毛sha|padhatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopadhatnkrosh毛sha|gopadhatnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipadhatrosh毛sha|gokipadhatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padhatromusha|padhatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadhatnkromusha|gopadhatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhatromusha|gokipadhatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:padhatmun眉sha|padhatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopadhatnkmun眉sha|gopadhatnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipadhatmun眉sha|gokipadhatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:padhatmush毛sha|padhatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopadhatnkmush毛sha|gopadhatnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipadhatmush毛sha|gokipadhatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:padhatmurosha|padhatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopadhatnkmurosha|gopadhatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipadhatmurosha|gokipadhatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:padhat|padhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:p忙dh忙t|p忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopadhat|hopadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hop忙dh忙t|hop忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopadhat|hohopadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohop忙dh忙t|hohop忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉padhat|n眉padhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉p忙dh忙t|n眉p忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉padhat|n眉n眉padhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉p忙dh忙t|n眉n眉p忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂padhat|n茂padhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂p忙dh忙t|n茂p忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂padhat|n茂n茂padhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂p忙dh忙t|n茂n茂p忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupadhat|lupadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lup忙dh忙t|lup忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupadhat|lulupadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulup忙dh忙t|lulup忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipadhat|lipadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lip忙dh忙t|lip忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipadhat|lilipadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilip忙dh忙t|lilip忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopadhat|kopadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kop忙dh忙t|kop忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopadhat|kokopadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokop忙dh忙t|kokop忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepadhat|kepadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kep忙dh忙t|kep忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepadhat|kekepadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekep忙dh忙t|kekep忙dh忙t]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
